title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Tontatta, Violet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as the Tontatta prepare their plan against Doflamingo while Franky, the Toy Soldier, and the rebels reveal Dressrosa’s hidden suffering.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...you really are

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A SHAME OF A MAN ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You appear to be in the middle of something, but excuse me!! You shame of a man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uoh!! Where the hell'd you come from !!

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Ah, Violet- chan

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: First, please eliminate those, for me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There he is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take care of small fries like this your- self!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: These fellows have Kanjuro as a hostage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So I could not strike at them

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I would like you to come with me, Sanji-Dono!! To a place called the "toy house"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My dear Comrade Kanjuro has been captured there, but I do not know where it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Once again, on green bit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Beneath the forest

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The Tontatta Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's law and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's all this rumbling about!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gyahh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Awawawa, shit, I don't want to die here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eh!? The hero is flustered!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The thing is... that shaking just now was actually my haki!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Haki"!!? The technique with which you defeated

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: 50,000 Foes at Fishman Island!!? That's our hero!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's enough energy to shake the whole king- Dom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please, please, go ahead and eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is called "fighting fish," a relative of the giant goldfish

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So delicious! Kind of tastes like Monster meat

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So it was really these guys who caught that fighting fish earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It was really big, so it'll keep everyone in the kingdom fed for months

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Just how insanely powerful are these dwarves!?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: But since you're a big human, usoland, please eat your fill

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: There's a member of my usolanders squad, Luffyland, who could eat it all in one bite!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: usoland?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: See over there? Doesn't that look familiar?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That picture book we saw on Jaya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That statue... is it of Montblanc Noland!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: indeed it is! Naturally you know of him as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He was a big human botanist who visited this country 400 long years ago

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At that time... He appeared before our ancestors, who were troubled by some bad big humans who were wrecking our island

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: He fought against them and led our people to victory, as the legendary hero of Tontatta!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: When usoland guessed his name right... and explained how he was the descendant of Noland

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It was so moving!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look!! Look at my head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This chest- nut head is proof of my Lineage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're really a bad person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're welcome. I ended up saving you too, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We get to eat, pick up some mementos, and be on our way

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But truly, this must be fate!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
